author: lOrm
content: Fixed. ServiceRegistry::analytics() and ::flags() now return &dyn AnalyticsSink / &dyn FeatureFlagSource via &*self.analytics / &*self.flags. The Arc no longer leaks into callers. Added explicit analytics_arc() / flags_arc() escape hatches that return Arc<dyn _> for the rare case where a caller really needs shared ownership (e.g. installing the sink into a background task). The smart-pointer choice is now an internal implementation detail.
